_comment: NSE equity/F&O trading holidays, YYYY-MM-DD (IST). This list is INCOMPLETE: it contains only fixed-Gregorian statutory holidays that fall on a weekday. Festival-based holidays (Holi, Ram Navami, Mahavir Jayanti, Good Friday, Bakri Id, Ganesh Chaturthi, Dussehra, Diwali/Laxmi Pujan, Balipratipada, Guru Nanak Jayanti, etc.) shift year to year and MUST be added from the official NSE circular before go-live. Set verified=true only once the full official list is entered.
